title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with proven expertise in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and scaling operations aligns perfectly with Finout's need for a hands-on Head of RevOps. The role's focus on building the operational backbone for a 100+ person company scaling beyond $30M ARR matches his senior executive background exactly.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—their mission to build the operational backbone for cloud cost management at scale is exactly the kind of high-growth B2B SaaS challenge you've mastered over 15+ years. With your deep Salesforce expertise and track record scaling RevOps across fintech and GTM, you'd be uniquely positioned to lead their go-to-market engine from both the Tel Aviv HQ and NYC hub. Given your comfort with the Tel Aviv area, this could be an ideal next move to shape GTM strategy at a critical growth inflection point.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, is hiring a RevOps Manager to partner with Sales and RevOps by providing dashboards, reporting tools, and regional insights to optimize territory performance. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, supporting GTM planning cycles, and maintaining territory mapping in Salesforce and Fullcast. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools, and CRM proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy, GTM planning, and dashboard/reporting work directly match his core competencies, though the role is slightly more specialized in territory optimization than a broader Head of RevOps.
ai_opener: Omri here—saw Gong's RevOps Manager opening and it immediately resonated. I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations strategies across B2B SaaS, including designing scalable territory models and GTM forecasting frameworks in Salesforce. I'd love to explore how my experience optimizing pipeline visibility and sales operations could help Gong take their territory strategy to the next level.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to build, own, and scale the operational backbone for its New Verticals division. Reporting to the Head of Revenue Operations, this is the first dedicated RevOps hire for the division—standing up systems, processes, and data infrastructure. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations with 2+ years senior, deep hands-on Salesforce configuration expertise, experience standing up RevOps infrastructure, and familiarity with GTM tools like Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot. A true build role with a builder mentality.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with strong Salesforce expertise and proven track record building GTM infrastructure from scratch aligns perfectly with this first-dedicated-hire build role. The remote US location matches his geographic flexibility, and his experience with pipeline forecasting and GTM tool stack directly addresses the New Verticals division's needs.
ai_opener: I noticed Flex is standing up RevOps infrastructure for New Verticals—a high-impact build that requires someone who's done this before at scale. With 15+ years building revenue operations foundations in B2B SaaS (including deep Salesforce configuration, Outreach, and data infrastructure), I've owned exactly this type of greenfield RevOps build. I'd welcome a conversation about how to architect systems that grow with your division.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Customer Operations
description: Later, a social media management and influencer marketing platform, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager for Customer Operations to build a unified customer health framework, partner with central RevOps on systems and automation, and act as a trusted operational partner to Services, Client Success, Sales, and Finance. Later's approach to building a unified customer health framework resonates with me, especially the emphasis on being a trusted operational partner across Services, Success, and Finance. I'd love to explore how my background scaling RevOps operations could help you drive operational excellence on the customer side.
